final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [9:0] q);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 10'b0000000001;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[8:0], ~q[9]};
        end
    end

endmodule
